name: Bilbo's room
description:
Pens and papers litter this small room at the edge of Elrond's House.  It is
the room that Bilbo Baggins has come to call home, and it is just about the
right size for such a well-travelled hobbit.  A window looks out upon the world
to the south, and to the north a large fireplace has been set into the wall to
provide heat.  A small hobbit-sized bed lies against the east wall.
